metaTitle: Unity Gate | Next-Gen Social & Psychological Platform
metaDescription: Access secure online therapy, expert matchmaking, and mediation services with Unity Gate.
heroSubtitle: Discover yourself against the invisible crisis of the modern age. Understand why you feel lonely, match with the right expert via AI, and draw your recovery route today.
visionDesc: Unity Gate stands as an unshakable fortress of trust in digital matchmaking and professional consulting. Our vision is to spread corporate standards that guarantee sincerity and security globally.
bento1Desc: Measure your loneliness level with scientific data. Let our AI algorithm map your clinical consulting route.
bento2Desc: We protect your mental health with international clinical standards. A secure, science-based approach.
bento3Desc: All your calls are end-to-end encrypted (E2EE). Your data is always safe with us.
process1Desc: Meet people who share your vision in interest rooms.
process2Desc: Socialize in military-encrypted groups guided by experts.
process3Desc: Overcome loneliness with collective consciousness and empathy.
process4Desc: Unity Gate is always with you. Coming soon to App Store and Google Play.
metaDescInsights: In-depth analysis on mental health, modern loneliness, and scientific recovery.
insightsSubtitle: In-depth analysis on mental health and scientific recovery.

digital-isolation.title: UCLA Loneliness Scale: Measuring Isolation
digital-isolation.body:
In a world where we are constantly online, feeling more disconnected than ever is the greatest paradox of the modern age.

The Cost of Superficial Connections

Hundreds of 'friends' cannot replace one true companion during a real crisis.

"The greatest loneliness is not being understood in a crowd."

The Unity Gate Approach

  • Matches based on psychological compatibility.
  • Secure areas with expert moderation.

modern-matchmaking.title: Modern Matchmaking: Real Connections
modern-matchmaking.body: It's time to build genuine human connections based on deep psychological compatibility rather than superficial swiping.

financial-stress.title: Financial Stress & Mental Health
financial-stress.body: The devastating effect of financial anxiety on our psychology and family bonds is a known fact. Our financial advisors help you manage this stress.

secure-online-therapy.title: Secure Online Therapy
secure-online-therapy.body: Military-grade encrypted, clinically proven online therapy experience. The special safe space for your data and mental health.

metaDescAbout: The vision, mission, and story of Unity Gate, founded by Aeternexus Inc.
heroSubtitleAbout: As Aeternexus Inc., we combine technology with empathy and science to solve the greatest crisis of the digital age.
missionText1: Although we are constantly online today, we feel more disconnected and lonely than ever in history. Unity Gate was born to break this paradox.
missionText2: Our goal is to enable people to form bonds where they are truly understood, using clinical psychology and AI, rather than superficial swiping or instant messaging.
visionText1: Developed under Aeternexus Inc., Unity Gate is not just an app, but a global HealthTech movement.
visionText2: By bringing expert psychologists, mediators, and financial advisors under one secure roof, we aim to make psychological support accessible, safe, and transparent for everyone.
val1Desc: We act with clinically proven methods such as the UCLA Loneliness Scale.
val2Desc: All your calls and data are protected with end-to-end encryption (E2EE).
val3Desc: Our algorithms work to connect us to people, not to screens.
